subject: [PATCH v6 01/20] nfsd: check fl_lmops in nfsd_breaker_owns_lease()

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch modifies the nfsd_breaker_owns_lease() function to quickly check if a lease is an NFS daemon (nfsd) lease by verifying that its fl_lmops field matches the nfsd_lease_mng_ops operations. This optimization allows for earlier rejection of non-nfsd leases, improving performance and reducing unnecessary checks. The patch adds a new constant nfsd_lease_mng_ops to the code and updates the function to check for this value before proceeding with further lease verification.
